summary: Draft closed PR for sysdolphin baselib sobjlib work. The slice decompiled HSD_SObjLib_803A477C, partially implemented HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68, changed HSD_SObj color bytes into GXColor fields, updated a sobjlib prototype priority parameter to u8, and adjusted one gmregtyfall caller to use GXColor channels. Bot output reported one new function match and one broken match/regressions; the PR was later marked superseded by PR #2485.

key_files.role: Primary decompilation work: added includes, local structs, data/static declarations, HSD_SObjLib_803A477C implementation, and large HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 implementation using GX/HSD state calls.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists HSD_SObjLib_803A477C 0.00% -> 100.00% and HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 0.00% -> 97.28%

key_files.role: Header type/prototype update: replaced individual color bytes x38-x3F with GXColor x38 and x3C, and changed HSD_SObjLib_803A477C priority parameter from int to u8.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_SObj fields x38..x3F replaced with GXColor x38 and GXColor x3C
raw_diff: HSD_SObjLib_803A477C prototype fifth parameter changed to u8

key_files.role: Caller adaptation to recovered HSD_SObj color layout, changing raw byte assignments to GXColor channel assignments.

what_changed.text: Implemented HSD_SObjLib_803A477C in C, including HSD_ObjAlloc, HSD_ASSERT, GXInitTlutObj/GXInitTexObjCI/GXInitTexObj setup, default SObj field initialization, optional secondary texture setup, texture coordinate scale setup, and insertion via HSD_SObjLib_803A44D4.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report new match HSD_SObjLib_803A477C +612, 100.00%

what_changed.text: Added a large C implementation of HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 covering GX state setup, TEV configuration branches, texture/TLUT loading, quad vertex writes to 0xCC008000, and HSD state cleanup.
Recovered HSD_SObj color storage as two GXColor fields at offsets 0x38 and 0x3C instead of eight individual u8 byte fields.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: sobjlib.h HSD_SObj x38..x3F replaced by GXColor x38 and x3C
raw_diff: sobjlib.c uses sobj->x38 and sobj->x3C with GXSetTevColor
raw_diff: gmregtyfall.c channel assignments to x3C.r/g/b/a

what_changed.text: Changed HSD_SObjLib_803A477C's priority argument in the header and implementation from int to u8.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: sobjlib.h prototype fifth parameter changed to u8
raw_diff: sobjlib.c implementation signature uses u8 priority

what_changed.text: The bot report recorded text progress but also a broken match in HSD_SObjLib_803A54EC and data-section regressions in .data and .sbss.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report broken match HSD_SObjLib_803A54EC 100.00% -> 99.95%

what_changed.text: The author commented that regression would be fixed when linking; a later comment states the PR was superseded by PR #2485.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: 'regression will be fixed when linking'

smart_moves.text: Updating the public HSD_SObj layout to GXColor allowed callers and rendering code to use channel names and GX APIs directly rather than treating color fields as unrelated byte offsets.
The HSD_SObjLib_803A477C prototype was tightened to use u8 for priority, matching its use when passed to HSD_SObjLib_803A44D4.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_SObjLib_803A477C signature uses u8 priority

decomp_lessons.lesson: When byte fields form a color passed to GX APIs, recovering the aggregate GXColor type can simplify both the owning struct and downstream callers.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_SObj x38..x3F changed to GXColor x38/x3C
raw_diff: GXSetTevColor calls take sobj->x38 and sobj->x3C

decomp_lessons.lesson: Code-match progress that introduces or exposes data-section movement should be treated cautiously; this PR's bot report shows a function match alongside .data/.sbss regressions and a broken adjacent match.
A PR superseded by a later PR is useful intake evidence but should not by itself be treated as accepted final source style.
evidence_refs: metadata_json: merged_at null and state CLOSED

naming_conventions.text: The PR used address-style names for unresolved functions and labels, such as HSD_SObjLib_803A477C, HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68, and lbl_804DEA80..lbl_804DEA90, while adding short local role names such as image, tlut, image2, sobj, desc, wrap_s, wrap_t, and priority.
Recovered struct fields retained offset-style names in local helper structs, including SObjLibData x4_funcs/x10_filename/x1C_errmsg and SObjLibSObjDesc x0/x4/x8.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Used a narrow PAD_STACK(0x10) in HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 local declarations include PAD_STACK(0x10)
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: No human explanation or objdiff excerpt specifically justifies the PAD_STACK; only the bot score improvement is present.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Used explicit volatile stores to 0xCC008000 for GX FIFO vertex emission.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: repeated *(volatile f32*) 0xCC008000 assignments inside HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Used grouped switch cases on the texture object format for similar TEV setup paths.
Used local stack copies and casts to pass static color constants to GXSetTevColorS10 and GXSetTevKColor.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: sp60/sp64, sp58/sp5C, sp50/sp54 with GXSetTevKColor
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The PR evidence does not prove these static data names or stack-copy shapes are accepted final style.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Replaced raw assert expansion with HSD_ASSERT in HSD_SObjLib_803A477C.

review_feedback.text: No review comments or reviews are present in the loaded PR slice.
Bot report noted one new match and several improvements, but also one broken match and data-section regressions.
Author stated the regression would be fixed when linking.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: regression will be fixed when linking

review_feedback.text: A later issue comment states the PR was superseded by PR #2485.

metadata_json: no review comments or reviews
notes: The diff and bot report give strong evidence for what changed and the reported match/regression state.
There is no PR body, no human review discussion, and no merge.
The final comment says the PR was superseded by PR #2485, so lessons should be treated as historical evidence and not proof of accepted final project style.
No local build logs, objdiff screenshots, or reviewer rationale are included beyond the bot report.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Recover aggregate GXColor fields when color bytes feed GX APIs
accepted_candidate_records.text: In this PR, HSD_SObj byte fields x38..x3F were replaced by GXColor x38 and GXColor x3C, enabling direct GXSetTevColor usage and channel-named caller assignments. Curator should compare with final/superseding PR before accepting globally.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Function progress can coexist with adjacent/data regressions
accepted_candidate_records.text: The bot report for this sobjlib PR lists HSD_SObjLib_803A477C as a new 100% match and HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 as a large improvement, but also reports HSD_SObjLib_803A54EC broken and .data/.sbss regressions.

source_update_candidates.title: Type recovered byte color groups as GXColor when supported by GX usage
source_update_candidates.text: Possible standard addition: when adjacent bytes are passed as GXColor values or accessed as r/g/b/a channels, prefer recovering a GXColor field over separate u8 fields. Verify with final merged source or superseding PR before adopting.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: HSD_SObj x38..x3F to GXColor x38/x3C
raw_diff: GXSetTevColor and channel access sites
source_update_candidates.reason: This is consistent with typed-fields-over-pointer-math, but the PR was superseded and unmerged, so curator review against PR #2485/final source is required.

source_update_candidates.title: sobjlib owns HSD_SObj rendering and texture setup functions
source_update_candidates.text: Candidate path fact: src/sysdolphin/baselib/sobjlib.c contains HSD_SObj allocation/setup and draw/state code around HSD_SObjLib_803A477C and HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful for search/routing, but should be checked against current source because this PR was superseded.

rejection_notes: Do not treat PAD_STACK(0x10) in HSD_SObjLib_803A4A68 as a generally accepted tactic from this PR alone; the slice lacks explicit objdiff justification beyond overall bot improvement.
Do not promote the static lbl_804DEA80..lbl_804DEA90 data declarations as accepted data ownership facts; the bot report shows .data and .sbss regressions and the PR was superseded.
Do not infer reviewer approval or merge acceptance; loaded metadata shows no reviews/review comments and merged_at is null.
